presets.name: KITSWAP GRAPHIC
presets.template:
PROMPT

Photorealistic football kitswap portrait, professional club media photoshoot style.

A male professional footballer with the same facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and body proportions as the reference player image, standing upright, facing camera, neutral confident expression.

The player is wearing the [KIT] shirt, accurately recreated from reference: [KIT COLOUR], correct modern athletic fit. [BADGE] crest on left chest, [KIT MAKER] logo on right chest, [SPONSOR] sponsor centered, all logos flat, realistic, properly scaled, and naturally integrated into the fabric (not pasted).

Realistic fabric folds, tension around shoulders and chest, natural lighting reflections on the shirt material. Skin texture visible, slight sweat sheen, realistic shadows under chin and arms.

Plain studio or soft gradient background, no text, no graphic elements, no poster layout.

Looks like an official transfer or squad photoshoot, shot on a DSLR, 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field. Ultra-realistic, high resolution, sharp focus, true-to-life proportions.

presets.name: MOUNT RUSHMORE
presets.template:
A hyper-realistic Mount Rushmore–style granite cliff monument carved with FOUR distinct portraits, left-to-right: [ PERSON 1] as the largest head on the far left, [PERSON 2] slightly behind and centered-left, [PERSON 3] smaller and recessed in the mid-right, and [PERSON 4] on the far right with a forward-facing, stern expression. Keep the exact composition: four colossal stone heads emerging from a single continuous cliff face, tight medium-wide framing, heads filling most of the frame, clear blue sky with a few soft cumulus clouds occupying the upper third. Match carving realism: chisel marks, weathered granite pores, subtle erosion streaks, sharp plane changes around cheekbones and brows, deep cut shadows in nostrils/lips, realistic stone “skin” texture. Include the lower slope: loose grey scree/rocks and sparse small green trees at the bottom edge. Lighting: bright midday sun from upper right, crisp but natural shadows, slightly warm highlights on stone, soft atmospheric haze, high dynamic range, ultra-detailed, photoreal, cinematic clarity, no stylization. 4K high resolution, extremely sharp focus, natural color grading, realistic scale and depth.

NEGATIVE PROMPT
cartoon, anime, painterly, lowpoly, smooth plastic, waxy faces, melted rock, blurry, low-res, noisy, over-sharpened halos, wrong number of heads, extra faces, duplicated face, distorted anatomy, asymmetrical carving, floating heads, text, watermark, logo, border, frame, oversaturated sky, dramatic sunset lighting, foggy/overcast, heavy vignette.

PARAMETERS / SETTINGS
Aspect ratio: 4:5
Output: 4K (e.g., 3072×3840 or higher)
Style: Photoreal / Ultra-detailed / HDR
Camera: medium-wide, eye-level, slight upward angle, deep depth-of-field

presets.name: MOUNT RUSHMORE MISSING
presets.template:
Ultra-realistic cinematic photograph of a rugged sandstone cliff face carved like a Mount Rushmore tribute, matching the exact composition and spacing of the reference image. Four equal “carving slots” across the rock:

1. [PERSON 1] head carved in raised relief on the far left,
2. [PERSON 2] carved in raised relief left-center,
3. [PERSON 3] carved in raised relief right-center,
4. far right slot is NOT carved — instead a clean, flat, untouched rock panel placeholder, subtly smoothed and squared off as if prepared for a future carving, with faint chisel guide marks and a slightly lighter fresh-stone tone.

Golden hour natural light, crisp micro-detail in stone grain, chisel marks, erosion, dust, realistic shadows in recessed engravings, subtle atmospheric haze, blue sky with soft clouds, small shrubs at the base of the cliff. Photoreal, high dynamic range, sharp focus, natural color, documentary realism.
Aspect ratio 4:5, ultra high resolution.

presets.name: LAST CHAIR
presets.template:
Ultra-realistic cinematic editorial boardroom photo, tight symmetrical composition. Camera positioned very close to the near end of a long matte dark-walnut conference table, low camera height, strong leading lines, tight crop (no ceiling, minimal headroom, tighter left/right margins). All faces should be completely in focus. The table is long but narrow and intimate, barely any space between their hands on the table.

Table is COMPLETELY EMPTY: bare matte wood only, no desk pads, no placemats, no folders, no paper, no laptops, no pens, no glass strip/inlay, no reflections, no objects whatsoever.

At the far end: one EMPTY chair centered, facing camera.

Four men seated closest to camera, two on each side, hands clasped on the bare tabletop, serious expressions, tailored navy suits/white shirts/dark ties:

Left closest: [PERSON 1]

Left next: [PERSON 2]

Right next: [PERSON 3]

Right closest: [PERSON 4]

Standing contenders are CLOSE to camera: directly behind the empty chair, one step behind it and near the table edge, shoulder-to-shoulder in a shallow arc, filling the upper half of the frame (full torso visible), composed and waiting to earn the seat:
[STANDING 1], [STANDING 2], [STANDING 3], [STANDING 4]

Background: NO WINDOW. Minimal premium interior: soft out-of-focus wood-paneled wall or neutral wall with subtle architectural lines, understated warm practical lights, no signage. High-end magazine lighting, crisp faces, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, 8k detail, photoreal.

presets.name: STAND UP SIT DOWN
presets.template:
TITLE: Corporate Boardroom Portrait – Five Men – Symmetrical Composition – Ultra Sharp

INTENT:
Recreate a hyper-realistic, editorial-style sports executive portrait with five adult males in suits arranged symmetrically around a boardroom table. All subjects facing camera. All in full sharp focus. Tight cinematic composition. Background replaced with [BACKGROUND].

SUBJECTS:

[PERSON 1]
- Position: Seated front-left (closest left to camera)
- Body angle: Slightly angled inward toward table center (~15°)
- Posture: Upright, shoulders squared
- Arms: Forearms resting on table
- Hands: Fingers interlocked, hands placed 6–8 inches from table edge
- Eye line: Direct to camera
- Expression: Neutral-serious, composed
- Distance to [PERSON 2]: ~10 inches shoulder-to-shoulder gap

[PERSON 2]
- Position: Seated left-middle
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~10° toward center)
- Posture: Upright
- Arms: Forearms resting on table
- Hands: Interlocked, resting flat
- Eye line: Direct to camera
- Expression: Calm, confident
- Distance to table edge: ~5 inches

[STANDING 1]
- Position: Centered behind table
- Stance: Feet shoulder-width apart
- Body orientation: Square to camera (0° rotation)
- Height framing: Head near top frame margin (5% headroom)
- Arms: Crossed at chest level
- Shoulders: Slightly raised for authority posture
- Expression: Serious, dominant, composed
- Eye line: Direct to camera
- Placement depth: 2–3 feet behind seated row
- Vertical dominance: Head highest in frame, center axis anchor

[PERSON 3]
- Position: Seated right-middle
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~10° toward center)
- Posture: Upright
- Arms: Forearms resting on table
- Hands: Interlocked
- Eye line: Direct to camera
- Expression: Neutral, analytical
- Distance to [PERSON 4]: ~10 inches shoulder gap

[PERSON 4]
- Position: Seated front-right (closest right to camera)
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~15° toward center)
- Posture: Upright
- Arms: Forearms resting on table
- Hands: Interlocked near table edge (6–8 inches from edge)
- Eye line: Direct to camera
- Expression: Calm, assertive

WARDROBE (ALL SUBJECTS):
- Navy tailored suits
- White dress shirts
- Dark navy or black ties
- Clean professional grooming
- No visible logos or patterns
- Matte fabric texture
- Structured shoulders

TABLE:
- Dark walnut executive boardroom table
- Smooth reflective surface (subtle reflection only)
- Rectangular
- Camera side edge visible across lower frame
- Subjects positioned close to table edge for compression effect
- Table occupies lower 25–30% of frame

CAMERA & FRAMING:

Lens: 85mm full-frame equivalent
Aperture: f/8 (deep focus — all five subjects sharp)
Camera height: Eye-level with seated row
Camera distance: ~6–8 feet from front edge of table
Framing: Vertical portrait (9:16 ratio)
Composition: Perfect bilateral symmetry
- [STANDING 1] centered vertically and horizontally
- Two seated subjects per side evenly mirrored
- Shoulder lines forming slight inward V shape toward center

DEPTH & SPACING:

- Seated row aligned horizontally
- All seated subjects equidistant from camera plane
- Standing subject positioned directly behind midpoint between [PERSON 2] and [PERSON 3]
- Depth layering:
   Foreground: Table edge
   Midground: Four seated subjects
   Background mid-layer: [STANDING 1]
   Background: [BACKGROUND]

FOCUS:
- All individuals 100% tack sharp
- No shallow depth blur on faces
- No motion blur
- High-resolution, ultra-detailed skin texture
- Clean cinematic contrast

LIGHTING:

Style: Soft editorial executive portrait lighting
Key light: Large softbox front-center slightly elevated
Fill: Soft even fill to remove harsh shadows
Rim light: Subtle hair separation light from rear left and rear right
No dramatic shadowing
Balanced exposure across all faces
No overblown highlights

BACKGROUND:
[BACKGROUND]
- Slightly blurred but recognizable environment
- Neutral tones
- Does not overpower subjects
- Framed symmetrically behind [STANDING 1]

MOOD:
- Authority
- Elite executive sports board
- Serious, composed, strategic
- Clean professional aesthetic

QUALITY TAGS:
Ultra realistic
Photorealistic
Cinematic clarity
High dynamic range
Sharp focus throughout
Professional sports editorial
Magazine cover composition
Symmetrical power portrait

presets.name: PLANE SEATS
presets.template:
{
  "prompt": {
    "style": "Photorealistic wide-angle interior shot",
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "reference_image": {
      "purpose": "Framing and composition reference only",
      "use_for": "Camera angle, perspective depth, row spacing and scale recession, seat layout positioning, cabin wall and ceiling proportions, lighting mood and tone, and how tightly the frame crops around the passengers.",
      "do_not_use_for": "Do not replicate, reference, or draw influence from any face, person, costume, hair, skin tone, or physical characteristic of any individual appearing in the reference image. The people in the reference image are entirely irrelevant and must be completely ignored. Only the environmental composition and framing matter."
    },
    "likeness_rule": "Every person must be rendered as a hyper-realistic, photographic likeness of the named celebrity. Faces must be accurate, detailed, and instantly recognisable. Treat each face as a portrait-quality render — correct facial structure, skin tone, distinctive features, and expression. No generic or approximated faces. Each person should be immediately identifiable without any label or name.",
    "person_count_rule": "There are exactly 14 people in this image. No more, no less. If any seat is marked EMPTY, no person, limb, or body part appears there under any circumstance.",
    "seating_realism_rules": {
      "rule_1": "Every person must be physically reclined into their seat with their back making full contact with the seat back. Hips must be fully in the seat. Natural, relaxed seated posture as if on a real flight — not perched, hovering, or leaning forward away from the seat.",
      "rule_2": "Each person's body must be fully contained within the width of their individual seat. No person should bleed into the aisle space or into an adjacent seat space under any circumstance.",
      "rule_3": "Every person must be visible from the top of the head down to at least mid-thigh, clearly showing them physically occupying the full depth of the seat.",
      "rule_4": "All seats in every row — whether occupied or empty — must appear as part of a single continuous fixed row of seating, uniform in depth, height, and spacing. No seat should appear as a separate or isolated piece of furniture.",
      "rule_5": "No person should appear to be sitting in, hovering over, or displaced into the aisle. Every occupant must be clearly anchored within the boundaries of their assigned seat column as defined in the seat grid."
    },
    "setting": {
      "location": "Commercial airline cabin",
      "camera_angle": "Approximately 30-40 degrees downward bird's-eye tilt, front-facing perspective looking toward the rear of the plane. Steep enough to clearly see the tops of shoulders, laps, and the full seat layout.",
      "seats": "Compact economy class seating. Fabric upholstered, textile material, matte dark navy blue finish. Absolutely no leather, no sheen, no premium or business class finish. Low-backed seats so that no seat back obscures or covers any part of a seated person's torso or face in any row.",
      "row_spacing": "Rows are tightly packed with minimal legroom between them. Rows must scale naturally in size — largest and widest at the front, smallest and narrowest at the back. No disproportionate gap between any two rows.",
      "aisle": "Single narrow central aisle running from front to back, dividing LEFT side and RIGHT side columns symmetrically. The aisle is a clear empty corridor — no person's body, arm, or leg enters the aisle space.",
      "cabin_detail_1": "Overhead luggage compartments lining both sides",
      "cabin_detail_2": "Warm neutral grey walls and ceiling",
      "cabin_detail_3": "Warm soft overhead cabin lighting, not overly bright or studio-lit",
      "cabin_detail_4": "Exactly 4 rows visible. No phantom or empty rows exist beyond these 4. A rear wall or subtle curtain sits immediately behind row 1 with no additional cabin space visible beyond it.",
      "framing": "Frame is tight on the passengers. Ceiling takes up no more than 10% of the total frame at the top. Passengers fill the majority of the frame."
    },
    "people_rules": {
      "posture": "Fully seated, back against seat back, hips fully in seat, completely physically occupying the seat as a real passenger would on a real flight",
      "facing": "Directly toward the camera",
      "visibility": "Every person is completely visible and identifiable from top of head to at least mid-thigh. No one is obscured, cut off, or turned away. No seat back should hide any part of any person in any row. Row 1 occupants must still be clearly visible and identifiable despite being smallest in perspective."
    },
    "empty_seat_rule": "Any seat marked EMPTY must be visibly and obviously unoccupied with the full seat cushion and back visible. No person, limb, shadow, or body part should appear in or near that seat. Empty seats must look identical in style and depth to occupied seats — part of the same continuous row.",
    "seat_grid": {
      "columns": {
        "col_1": "LEFT WINDOW — furthest left, adjacent to left cabin wall",
        "col_2": "LEFT MIDDLE — centre of left seat block",
        "col_3": "LEFT AISLE — closest to aisle on the left",
        "col_4": "RIGHT AISLE — closest to aisle on the right",
        "col_5": "RIGHT MIDDLE — centre of right seat block",
        "col_6": "RIGHT WINDOW — furthest right, adjacent to right cabin wall"
      },
      "grid": {
        "row_1_furthest_back": {
          "note": "This row has only 2 seats total — one per side. No middle seat exists in this row.",
          "LEFT WINDOW": "[PERSON 1]",
          "LEFT MIDDLE": "NO SEAT EXISTS",
          "LEFT AISLE": "NO SEAT EXISTS",
          "RIGHT AISLE": "NO SEAT EXISTS",
          "RIGHT MIDDLE": "NO SEAT EXISTS",
          "RIGHT WINDOW": "[PERSON 2]"
        },
        "row_2_second_from_back": {
          "note": "This row has 6 seats — 3 per side. Window seats are empty.",
          "LEFT WINDOW": "EMPTY",
          "LEFT MIDDLE": "[PERSON 3]",
          "LEFT AISLE": "[PERSON 4]",
          "RIGHT AISLE": "[PERSON 5]",
          "RIGHT MIDDLE": "[PERSON 6]",
          "RIGHT WINDOW": "EMPTY"
        },
        "row_3_second_from_front": {
          "note": "This row has 6 seats — 3 per side. Middle seats are empty.",
          "LEFT WINDOW": "[PERSON 7]",
          "LEFT MIDDLE": "EMPTY",
          "LEFT AISLE": "[PERSON 8]",
          "RIGHT AISLE": "[PERSON 9]",
          "RIGHT MIDDLE": "EMPTY",
          "RIGHT WINDOW": "[PERSON 10]"
        },
        "row_4_closest_to_camera": {
          "note": "This row has 6 seats — 3 per side. Aisle seats are empty.",
          "LEFT WINDOW": "[PERSON 11]",
          "LEFT MIDDLE": "[PERSON 12]",
          "LEFT AISLE": "EMPTY",
          "RIGHT AISLE": "EMPTY",
          "RIGHT MIDDLE": "[PERSON 13]",
          "RIGHT WINDOW": "[PERSON 14]"
        }
      }
    },
    "costumes": {
      "[PERSON 1]": "[COSTUME 1]",
      "[PERSON 2]": "[COSTUME 2]",
      "[PERSON 3]": "[COSTUME 3]",
      "[PERSON 4]": "[COSTUME 4]",
      "[PERSON 5]": "[COSTUME 5]",
      "[PERSON 6]": "[COSTUME 6]",
      "[PERSON 7]": "[COSTUME 7]",
      "[PERSON 8]": "[COSTUME 8]",
      "[PERSON 9]": "[COSTUME 9]",
      "[PERSON 10]": "[COSTUME 10]",
      "[PERSON 11]": "[COSTUME 11]",
      "[PERSON 12]": "[COSTUME 12]",
      "[PERSON 13]": "[COSTUME 13]",
      "[PERSON 14]": "[COSTUME 14]"
    },
    "finishing_note": "The shot is clean and composed like a promotional editorial photo. No motion blur. Sharp focus on every person throughout all rows."
  }
}
